The '''Super Star Destroyer prototype''' was a massive [[Warship/Legends|warship]] developed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] some time after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as part of the [[Sarlacc Project]].<ref name="TCOC" />

==Characteristics==
This dreadnought<ref name="TEGTW" /> was 12 kilometers long, but did not represent the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|final version]] of the planned SSD design.<ref name="TCOC" /> It had one main power core located within.<ref name="JOTS" /> Upon completion, it would have been heavily armed.<ref name="TCOC" />

==History==
Code-named the Sarlacc Project, the vessel was designed by engineers on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and built in orbit of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].<ref name="TCOC" /> It was meant to ultimately serve as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], but would never see completion, as it was [[Battle of Byss|attacked and destroyed]] by a strike force of early rebels, pirates and smugglers amassed by the [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] noble [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Alya Aldrete]].<ref name="JOTS" />

After having disabled the shipyard's defenses, the pilots flew through its unfinished interior, blew up the power core and escaped. Many worlds learned of the rebels' triumph and this event would be one of many to inspire the formation of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="JOTS" />

As it was the largest vessel built by the Empire at the time, it took some time before its successor, the ''Executor'', was begun, due to the resource-extensive construction. Its destruction allowed burgeoning Rebel groups to face off against only lesser ships, and allowed them time to build up fleets of their own.<ref name="JOTS" />
